query:
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD `username` varchar(100);
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD `password` varchar(255);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `clients` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`phone` varchar(30) DEFAULT '',
	`email` varchar(255) DEFAULT '',
	`notes` text,
	`address` varchar(255) DEFAULT '',
	`city` varchar(100) DEFAULT '',
	`state` varchar(50) DEFAULT '',
	`zip` varchar(20) DEFAULT '',
	`created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `clients_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `vehicles` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`client_id` int NOT NULL,
	`year` varchar(4) DEFAULT '',
	`make` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`model` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`vin` varchar(17) DEFAULT '',
	`plate` varchar(20) DEFAULT '',
	`color` varchar(50) DEFAULT '',
	`mileage` int,
	`created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `vehicles_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `appointments` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`client_id` int NOT NULL,
	`vehicle_id` int,
	`service` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`date` date NOT NULL,
	`time` time NOT NULL,
	`duration_minutes` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 60,
	`appt_status` enum('scheduled','confirmed','completed','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'scheduled',
	`notes` text,
	`created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `appointments_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `invoices` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`number` int NOT NULL,
	`client_id` int NOT NULL,
	`vehicle_id` int,
	`status` enum('draft','sent','paid','overdue') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
	`notes` text,
	`total` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
	`issued_date` date,
	`due_date` date,
	`paid_date` date,
	`tax_rate` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT '0' NOT NULL,
	`discount_amount` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT '0' NOT NULL,
	`payment_method` varchar(50),
	`created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `invoices_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `invoices_number_unique` UNIQUE(`number`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `invoice_items` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`invoice_id` int NOT NULL,
	`type` enum('labor','parts') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'labor',
	`description` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`hourly_rate` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT '0',
	`hours` decimal(6,2) DEFAULT '0',
	`quantity` int DEFAULT 1,
	`unit_price` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT '0',
	`line_total` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
	CONSTRAINT `invoice_items_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `estimates` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`number` int NOT NULL,
	`client_id` int NOT NULL,
	`vehicle_id` int,
	`est_status` enum('draft','sent','approved','declined','converted') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
	`notes` text,
	`total` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
	`valid_until` date,
	`converted_invoice_id` int,
	`created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `estimates_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `estimates_number_unique` UNIQUE(`number`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `estimate_items` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`estimate_id` int NOT NULL,
	`est_item_type` enum('labor','parts') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'labor',
	`description` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`hourly_rate` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT '0',
	`hours` decimal(6,2) DEFAULT '0',
	`quantity` int DEFAULT 1,
	`unit_price` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT '0',
	`line_total` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
	CONSTRAINT `estimate_items_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `service_history` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`client_id` int NOT NULL,
	`vehicle_id` int,
	`invoice_id` int,
	`service` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`cost` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
	`date` date NOT NULL,
	`notes` text,
	`mileage` int,
	`created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `service_history_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `booking_settings` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`is_enabled` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
	`business_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'GoatMez Auto Shop',
	`business_hours_start` time NOT NULL DEFAULT '09:00',
	`business_hours_end` time NOT NULL DEFAULT '17:00',
	`available_days` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '[1,2,3,4,5]',
	`slot_duration_minutes` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 60,
	`max_advance_days` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 30,
	`available_services` text,
	`created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `booking_settings_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
